modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble uploading files to OneDrive

full_description_text:  
I trying to upload files to OneDrive. But it not working. I don’t know what to do. Can someone help me?
description: I trying to upload files to OneDrive. But it not working. I don’t know what to do. Can someone help me?
